summary: Completed comprehensive testing of 100Cr Engine MVP. Backend APIs working perfectly (8/8 tests passed). Frontend core functionality working well with minor UI interaction improvements needed.

ui_bugs.issue: Range input elements within slider containers not easily accessible for automated interaction
Home navigation link has stability issues during click (element not stable)

design_issues.issue: Initial chart console warnings about width/height being -1 (recovers properly)

passed_tests: Calculator page loads with proper test IDs
MRR and Growth rate sliders present
Projection chart renders with proper SVG
Milestone cards show proper dates and values
Pricing section with Free and Founder plans visible
